_comment: PERFORMANCE-FIRST SETTINGS — Speed and quality priority.
Opus for complex tasks. Fewest restrictions, maximum capability.
Best for: complex architecture work, critical debugging, code reviews.
Trade-off: highest cost per session. Use for high-value tasks only.
Copy this file to your project's .claude/settings.json

model._comment: Opus for deep reasoning. Worth the cost for complex or ambiguous tasks.

preferences._comment: Auto-approve most operations to minimize friction. Detailed output for full context.

CLAUDE.md._comment: Use comprehensive template for maximum first-pass accuracy.

fileReading._comment: Full file reads for complete understanding. Cost is secondary to quality.

permissions._comment: Nearly unrestricted. Only block genuinely dangerous operations.

behavior._comment: No artificial restrictions. Read freely, edit comprehensively.

costGuardrails._comment: High limits for complex tasks. Trust the model to be efficient.
